# backend/ml/reference/agentic_stack.py
# auto-generated explainer ¬∑ 2026-06-10T10:01:17Z

## Purpose
INSUR reference: 10-layer agentic execution stack per ¬ß64.40.

Operator architecture brief 2026-05-22:

    User Goal ‚Üí Council ‚Üí Planner ‚Üí Task Decomposition ‚Üí Policy/Governance
    ‚Üí Computer-Using Agent ‚Üí Stagehand/Browser-Use ‚Üí Playwright
    ‚Üí Browser/Desktop/API ‚Üí Enterprise Applications

This module ships:
  - PlannerAgent  ‚Äî decomposes goal ‚Üí task DAG (uses Ollama)
  - Decomposer    ‚Äî refines high-level tasks to atomic actions with scope tags
  - PolicyEngine  ‚Äî allowlist / scope grants / cost gate / approval router
  - CuaOrchestrator ‚Äî chooses interface adapter (browser / desktop / API)
  - StagehandAdapter (STUB) ‚Äî would wrap Browserbase Stagehand
  - PlaywrightAdapter (STUB) ‚Äî would wrap Playwright sessions
  - AgenticRun manifest ‚Äî full per-layer audit trail

Stubs for layers 7-10 because real browser automation requires a live
session / Browserbase API key / target system. The CONTRACT is honored ‚Äî
audit rows for every layer, drill-able invariants ‚Äî actual side-effects
are dry-run by default.

Run dry: `python -m backend.ml.reference.agentic_stack --goal "..."`

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import time
- from `_` import uuid
- from `dataclasses` import asdict, dataclass, field
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any, Literal

## Inputs
- CLI args: --goal, --dept, --user, --scopes, --budget, --ollama-url, --ollama-model, --artifacts-root

## Process
### Classes
- `Task`: (no docstring)
- `AgenticRun`: (no docstring)
- `PlannerAgent`: Decomposes a user goal into a task DAG.
- `Decomposer`: (no docstring)
- `PolicyEngine`: Allowlist + scope check + cost gate + approval router.
- `StagehandAdapter`: STUB ‚Äî real implementation would wrap browserbase/stagehand SDK.
- `PlaywrightAdapter`: STUB ‚Äî real implementation would use playwright-python sync API.
- `OpenClawAdapter`: LIVE adapter ‚Äî wraps the local OpenClaw bridge at /api/v1/openclaw/*.
- `PaperclipAdapter`: LIVE adapter ‚Äî wraps the local Paperclip artifact/context bridge at
- `CuaOrchestrator`: Layer 6 ‚Äî picks the right adapter per task action.
- `CouncilAdapter`: Layer 2 ‚Äî uses existing 3-stage council if available; trivial pass-through otherwise.
- `AgenticStackRunner`: (no docstring)
### Functions
- `_main()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above
